goal: Normal cases stay below urgent referral thresholds.
expected_artifact: Synthetic validation summary tracks correct prediction and no urgent-review flag.

goal: Diabetic retinopathy grading explains ETDRS-aligned severity bands.
expected_artifact: Clinical report preserves severity label and escalation recommendation.

goal: Low-quality fundus inputs trigger image-quality warnings.
expected_artifact: Monitoring snapshot increments low-quality counters and quality-flag counts.

goal: Metadata can raise referral urgency without changing the underlying disease label.
expected_artifact: Risk score and recommendations shift while keeping classifier output stable.

goal: FHIR and JSON outputs keep the same study reference and structured findings.
expected_artifact: Report export paths remain aligned with the main analysis pipeline.
